originalTitle: Resident Evil Veronica - Official Reveal Trailer
content: Take a look at this reveal trailer for the remake of RE Code Veronica, revealed during the Summer Game Show 2026. Tune into Summer Game Fest 2026 on June 5th at 2pm PT/5 pm ET! Hosted by Geoff Keighley and co-host Lucy James check out a 2 hour live look at what's next in video games, with new game announcements, reveals, updates, world premieres, surprise special guests and more. After Summer Game Fest wraps join GameSpot as we break down the biggest reveals, most surprising moments, what we wished was there and more. #sgf2026 #sgf #summergamefest #gaming Follow our curator page on steam: https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/
chineseTitle: | 生 | 化 | 危 | 机 | 维 | 罗 | 妮 | 卡 | | - | | 官 | 方 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 请观看在 2026 年夏季游戏展期间发布的《RE 代码维罗妮卡》重制版预告片。请于 6 月 5 日太平洋时间下午 2 点/东部时间下午 5 点收看 2026 年夏季游戏节！由杰夫·基斯利 (Geoff Keighley) 和联合主持人露西·詹姆斯 (Lucy James) 主持，观看 2 小时的视频游戏动态直播，包括新游戏公告、揭晓、更新、全球首发、惊喜特邀嘉宾等。夏季游戏节结束后，请加入 GameSpot，我们将详细介绍最大的揭秘、最令人惊讶的时刻、我们希望的内容等等。 #sgf2026 #sgf #summergamefest #gaming 在 Steam 上关注我们的策展人页面：https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
